title: spergularia canadensis subsp. occidentalis
intro: Spergularia canadensis subsp. occidentalis, also known as Western sandwort, is a plant species within the Caryophyllaceae family, native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, allowing it to be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Western sandwort include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Western sandwort can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
